_comment: Hooks for the commons-bonds project. SessionStart fires session-start-worktree-isolation.sh (the load-bearing branch-contamination prevention layer; emits reminder + worktree-creation paste-text when a session starts in the main /Users/c17n/commons-bonds cwd; see tools/memory/feedback_worktree_isolation_for_parallel_sessions.md) and session-start-orphan-lock-recovery.sh (opportunistically reclaims orphan-locked .claude/worktrees/agent-* worktrees whose owning process has died; conservative gating — dead lock pid + ≥1h since last commit + ahead=0 + dirty=0; dry-run by default unless COMMONS_BONDS_HOOK_DESTRUCTIVE=1; see tools/scripts/session-start-orphan-lock-recovery.sh header for empirical anchors). SessionEnd fires session-end-worktree-cleanup.sh (removes the current top-level isolated worktree + branch if fully merged + clean + no MERGE-HOLD/MERGE-AFTER marker; dry-run by default unless COMMONS_BONDS_HOOK_DESTRUCTIVE=1; eliminates the orphan-top-level-worktree accumulation pattern empirically validated twice by tools/workstream-handoffs/git-cleanup-sweep_2026-05-28.md and tools/workstream-handoffs/git-cleanup-sweep-round-2_2026-05-30.md §4.1). session-start-render-toolchain.sh installs the canonical render toolchain in Anthropic remote-container sessions (gated on CLAUDE_CODE_REMOTE=true; local laptop sessions use Docker via Colima instead); see tools/workstream-handoffs/render-toolchain-containerization-handoff_2026-05-18.md §4.4.
